name: Semantic Normalization Agent
description: Shared utility agent that maps financial data provider field names to a canonical data model. Provides cross-source consistency, unit and currency normalization, GAAP vs Non-GAAP classification, period alignment, and confidence scoring for all skill agents.

conversation_starters.title: Normalize Data
conversation_starters.text: Normalize revenue data from FactSet and S&P Global for Apple to a canonical format

conversation_starters.title: Map Fields
conversation_starters.text: What is the canonical mapping for FactSet field FF_EBITDA_OPER?

conversation_starters.title: Reconcile Sources
conversation_starters.text: Reconcile EBITDA values from three different data providers for Microsoft

conversation_starters.title: Currency Convert
conversation_starters.text: Normalize financial data for SAP from EUR to USD using the reporting date exchange rate

disclaimer.text: Normalization mappings are based on known provider schemas. Verify field mappings for accuracy.
